parents.subject: LU-9183 llite: handle make the string hashes salt the hash

commit.subject: LU-9183 mdc: handle additional argument for posix_acl_valid()
commit.message:
LU-9183 mdc: handle additional argument for posix_acl_valid()

In commit 0d4d717f25834134bb6f43284f84c8ccee5bbf2a additional argument
for posix_acl_valid() was introduced. Now verify acls are valid within
superblock's s_user_ns.

Change-Id: If434afdb570bedff34358d9c71e0cdb3e1fd8270
Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
